You can handle events in two ways:

inlineContent.text: SwiftDisc provides high-level routers for common bot patterns:
All Discord REST endpoints are available as methods on
The client includes a built-in cache that stores Discord entities:

inlineContent.text: For large bots, use sharding to distribute load:

inlineContent.text: All methods are serialized and safe to call from any context
